texto: Most anti-vaccine books claim that all shots are bad, the diseases aren't really anything to fear, and as long as you live a natural and healthy lifestyle, you don't have to worry. I think this is a very irresponsible approach to the vaccine issue. Vaccines are beneficial in ridding our population of both serious and nonserious diseases.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Robert W. Sears sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Most anti-vaccine books claim that all shots are bad, the diseases aren't really anything to fear…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, children, health, útil em momentos de health e vaccines.
